Tests the behavior of the Math.exp function with Infinity as input.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.exp` function in JavaScript. It checks if the exponential function, when given `Infinity` as an input, returns `Infinity` as expected. The use of the `assert` statement ensures that the test will throw an error if the condition is not met, which helps in validating the correctness of the `Math.exp` implementation. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific mathematical operation.
